parsed.generic_mechanism: Exact textual duplication eliminates any craft differential; identical repetition, emphatic cadence, concrete analogies, and recap structure produce the same reading experience.

paraphrased_evidence.A: A forceful premise uses concrete scenarios, statistics, and a memorable two-part metaphor, but repeated assurances, comparisons, and commands keep circling conclusions already established; the final recap reinforces compliance more than it generates fresh momentum.
paraphrased_evidence.B: Concrete scenarios, statistics, and a memorable two-part metaphor give the forceful premise some texture, yet recurring assurances, comparisons, and commands repeatedly revisit settled conclusions; the closing recap emphasizes compliance rather than renewed forward pull.
